nativeProps: Native file-input attributes except owned type, accept, capture, multiple, className, and onChange

compositionPolicy.nativeControl: One real input type=file owns keyboard activation, browser selection, form association, accept, multiple, capture, and directory behavior.
compositionPolicy.label: The visible action is the native input label; the transparent input covers the complete 44 CSS pixel target and receives focus directly.
compositionPolicy.selection: The callback receives an immutable array snapshot while the browser-owned FileList and native form control remain intact.
compositionPolicy.internalSynchronization: Sibling composites use one bounded internal helper to synchronize real Files into the native input; it validates file-input type, multiplicity, count, and assignment, clears before failure, and emits no synthetic event. The helper is intentionally not re-exported from the public item index.
